ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "native_title_determination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Native Title Determination associated with the application */,
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of claim (e.g., claimant, non-claimant, compensation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., lodged, determined, pending) */,
  "lodged_date" TEXT /* Date the application was lodged */,
  "determined_date" TEXT /* Date the application was determined */,
  "claimant_name" TEXT /* Name of the claimant */,
  "claimant_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the claimant */,
  "claimant_legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative */,
  "claimant_legal_representative_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the legal representative */,
  "claim_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the claim */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the application is lodged */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the application */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_native_title_determination_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_title_determination_id") REFERENCES native_title_determinations ("native_title_determination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_claim_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type_id") REFERENCES claim_types ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_title_determinations" (
  "native_title_determination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Native Title Determination */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Native Title Determination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Native Title Determination */,
  "determination_date" TEXT /* Date when the determination was made */,
  "determination_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the determination */,
  "determination_status" TEXT /* Status of the determination (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "determination_type" TEXT /* Type of determination (e.g., claimant, non-claimant, compensation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_title_determination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim type */,
  "is_amendable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the claim type is amendable */,
  "amended_claim_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amended claim type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state (e.g., NSW, VIC, QLD) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_states" (
  "application_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application state */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of applications for the state */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the application state */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the application state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_states_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_states_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, claimant, decision-maker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the document is attached to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application form, evidence) */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application or determination */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., lodged, determined, updated) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred (e.g., state, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting entry */,
  "native_title_determination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Native Title Determination */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of applications or determinations for the state */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_native_title_determination_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_title_determination_id") REFERENCES native_title_determinations ("native_title_determination_id")
)
